holdings.infoBox: EEM is an equity ETF with a total of 1230 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.58%, Samsung Electronics at 8.03%, SK hynix at 6.32%, Tencent Holdings at 2.95%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.91%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (EEM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets index. The fund tracks an index of emerging-market firms weighted by market cap. EEM was launched on Apr 7, 2003 and is issued by BlackRock.
